title: rubroshorea pilosa
intro: Rubroshorea pilosa, also known as red shorea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains compounds with antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rubroshorea pilosa include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In traditional medicine, the bark is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it may also be used in the form of a tincture or ointment for topical application.
